description: Use this API routine to apply the dc analogy network solution algorithm to the network modeled in the working case (activity DCLF). This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = dclf_2(sid, all, status, brnch, ckt)
python_syntax: ierr = dclf_2(sid, all, status, brnch, ckt)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Is a valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: Is the all buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of 6 elements specifying calculation options. The value of each element is as follows. (input).

parameters.name: brnch
parameters.description: An array of 3 elements specifying calculation options. The use of each element is as follows. The values can all be zero or defaulted if no branch is to be changed for the solution. (input).

parameters.name: ckt
parameters.description: Is the circuit id of the branch for which status is to be changed for the solution. (input; ‘1’ by default).

status.description: is the loss estimate option. (1 by default).
use the present voltage vector to estimate losses and apply them as “hidden loads”.
is the regulating phase shifter code (0 by default).
fixed phase shift angles in the base case and the change case.
fixed MW in the base case, fixed phase shift angles in the change case.
fixed MW in the base case and the change case.
is rating used in tabulating the report; 1 through 12 (default rating set program option setting by default).
is the voltage that should be saved. (0 by default).
base case dc power flow voltages.
change case dc power flow voltages.
is status of the changed branch upon completion (0 by default).
is action code if the MW mismatch exceeds 0.5 MW. (1 by default).

brnch.description: is the from bus of the branch for which status is to be changed for the solution (0 by default).
is the to bus of the branch for which status is to be changed for the solution (0 by default).
is the third bus connected by a three-winding transformer, or zero for a nontransformer branch or a two-winding transformer (0 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
multi-section line specified but multi-section line reporting option is disabled.
closing a multi-section line is invalid in DCLF.
returning a Type 4 bus to service is not allowed in DCLF.
closing a three-winding transformer is not allowed in DCLF.
buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
